name: Marcus Chen
content: The quality is unmatched. I've been wearing my Rebar Hoodie daily for 6 months and it still looks new. This is the only brand that understands brutalist design.

name: Elena Voss
content: Finally, streetwear that respects construction. The modular pocket system on the cargo pants is genius. I can carry everything without a bag.

name: Jay Thompson
content: The Utility Vest is my everyday carry. Detachable pouches mean I can reconfigure for shoots. Durability is insane.

name: Aiko Tanaka
content: SILO tees are the only tees I trust. The fit after 50 washes is identical to day one. That's rare.
